description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian:stable Docker image for both jobs in the deploy stage. Add a pages job that runs only on the release branch, executes apt-get update -q, apt-get install -qy python3-sphinx python3-sphinx-rtd-theme build-essential, cd doc, make html, cd .., mv doc/_build/html public, and publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Add a pages_development_branch job that runs only on the master branch, runs the same commands but moves the built HTML to a pages_development directory and publishes that as an artifact. No caches or services are defined, and the artifacts are specified with paths public and pages_development respectively.
